notes

A Note on Curvature-Dimension Conditions and $L^1$ Optimal Transport

June 2026

optimal transport
Drive

These notes study the curvature-dimension condition $\text{CD}(K,N)$ and its connection to $L^1$ optimal transport. After reviewing Kantorovich duality and Brenier’s theorem, I derive $\text{CD}(K,N)$ for Riemannian manifolds via Ricci curvature — covering the Jacobian of the exponential map, Bochner’s formula, and the $\Gamma_2$ calculus — as motivation for the metric measure space formulation. Examples include the one-dimensional and spherical cases. I also note that $\text{CD}(K,N)$ bounds for von Mises–Fisher distributions appear to be absent from the literature. The notes close with measure disintegration and transport sets in the $L^1$ setting, and an open problem.
